top_signals.title: Revolut ditches law firm panel in favour of ‘high-performance’ standards
top_signals.summary: Fintech giant Revolut is scrapping the ‘traditional’ method of assigning external law firms in favour of a new system where no law firm’s position is secure. Businesses that need external law firms on hand hold a panel session, where they vet law firms within their price range, and those that win secure a spot for [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Streeting’s EU Plan would cost our hard-won relationship with Trump
top_signals.summary: West Streeting's pitch to rejoin the EU may play well with Labour Party members, but it will prove a liability for whoever has to govern.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
